title: AILE Blood Glucose Monitor Kit, 50 Glucometer Strips, 50 Lancets, 1 Blood Sugar Monitor, Blood Sugar Test Kit with Voice Broadcast, Diabetics Meter for Home Use Test, No Coding, Large Display (A616)
features: Advanced Biosensor Technology: Our blood glucose monitors uses the glucose oxidase method, and only 0.7μL of blood sample is needed to quickly obtain accurate results within 5 seconds. It has been automatically calibrated at the factory, no manual adjustment is required, and it is simple and convenient to use

No Need to Adjust the Code and Plug and Play: This blood sugar monitor automatically turns on when the test strip is inserted, and automatically sucks blood for intelligent measurement, without manual settings, reducing errors. Use our low-pain puncture device to collect samples and easily complete the test. The unit can be selected as mg/dL or mmol/L

Voice Broadcast, Backlit Large Screen: AILE glucose monitor is equipped with a clear large screen and bold fonts, which is convenient for the elderly to read. It has a voice broadcast function and can easily read blood glucose values. It can also display the average blood glucose values ​​of 7 days, 14 days, 30 days and 90 days, allowing users to easily view all stored records and better understand blood glucose changes

Low-Pain Puncture Device: The ergonomically designed low-pain blood collection needle has 5 depth settings, which effectively reduces pain and ensures stable sampling. It is simple to operate, and even beginners can easily get started. It is suitable for the elderly, children and pregnant women

Complete Blood Glucose Testing Kit: Our diabetes testing kit provides comprehensive daily health testing, including a blood glucose monitor, 50 test strips, 50 lancets, 2 AAA batteries, 1 lancet and storage box. One set of equipment can meet your needs to quickly understand your daily blood glucose level at home.
description: Product Description AILE Blood Glucose Monitor > Features at a glance Measurement Data Search Our blood glucose test kit can store up to 99 test results and provide 7-day, 14-day, 30-day and 90-day average blood glucose test values, making it easy to track daily blood glucose levels and better manage your blood glucose treatment. No Code Design, Easy to Use The blood glucose meter adopts a password-free design. The test can be performed by correctly inserting the test strip. Only 0.7 µl of blood sample is needed and the blood glucose value can be obtained in 5 seconds. It is fast, reduces wounds and relieves pain. Anti-interference Test Paper This blood glucose test strip (glucose oxidase method) adopts the most advanced biosensor technology, using highly specific oxidoreductase to measure the glucose content of whole blood in capillaries, with high accuracy and strong anti-interference ability. Low-pain Puncture Device The low-pain blood collection needle combines 5 different depth settings, and can adjust the appropriate gear according to needs, with fast speed, reduced wounds, and pain relief. Ensure stable blood collection. Previous page Next page 1 How to Get Blood Sugar ？ 2 Measurement Precautions ！ 3 Frequently Asked Question
